glosses.yue: 戀愛中的; 愛上了的
glosses.ja: 恋している; 恋愛中

translations.hi: मैं पूरी तरह से प्यार में पड़ गई हूँ.

tokens.explanation: Personal pronoun, 1st person singular nominative; subject of the clause.
Finite copular auxiliary (present indicative, 1st sg) linking the subject to the predicative adjective.
Degree adverb intensifying the predicate adjective.
Predicative adjective meaning ‘in love’; complements the copula.

translations.en: He seems really in love today.
translations.fr: Il a l'air vraiment amoureux aujourd'hui.
translations.ko: 그는 오늘 정말 사랑에 빠진 것 같아.
translations.zh-Hans: 他今天看起来像是恋爱了。
translations.yue: 佢今日好似真係戀愛咗。
translations.vi: Hôm nay trông anh ấy có vẻ đang yêu thật.
translations.ar: يبدو أنه واقع في الحب حقًا اليوم.
translations.hi: आज वह सच में प्यार में लगता है.
translations.nb: Han virker virkelig forelsket i dag.
translations.id: Hari ini dia terlihat benar-benar jatuh cinta.
translations.da: Han virker virkelig forelsket i dag.
translations.ja: 彼は今日は本当に恋しているみたい。

tokens.explanation: Personal pronoun, 3rd person singular nominative; subject of the clause.
Finite lexical verb (present indicative, 3rd sg) meaning ‘appears/seems’; takes a predicative complement.
Temporal adverb modifying the clause.
Degree adverb intensifying the predicative adjective.
Predicative adjective serving as complement to ‘wirkt’.

sentences.target: Ich mag sie, aber ich bin nicht verliebt.
sentences.reading: /ɪç maːk ziː, ˈaːbɐ ɪç bɪn nɪçt fɛɐ̯ˈliːpt/

translations.de: Ich mag sie, aber ich bin nicht verliebt.
translations.ipa: /ɪç maːk ziː, ˈaːbɐ ɪç bɪn nɪçt fɛɐ̯ˈliːpt/
translations.en: I like her, but I'm not in love.
translations.es: Me gusta, pero no estoy enamorado.
translations.fr: Elle me plaît, mais je ne suis pas amoureux.
translations.it: Lei mi piace, ma non sono innamorato.
translations.ko: 난 그녀가 좋지만 사랑에 빠지진 않았어.
translations.zh-Hans: 我喜欢她，但我没有爱上她。
translations.yue: 我鍾意佢，但我未愛上佢。
translations.ru: Она мне нравится, но я не влюблён.
translations.pt: Gosto dela, mas não estou apaixonado.
translations.he: אני מחבב אותה, אבל אני לא מאוהב.
translations.vi: Tôi thích cô ấy, nhưng tôi chưa yêu.
translations.ar: أنا معجب بها، لكنني لست واقعًا في الحب.
translations.nl: Ik vind haar leuk, maar ik ben niet verliefd.
translations.uk: Вона мені подобається, але я не закоханий.
translations.hu: Kedvelem őt, de nem vagyok szerelmes.
translations.hi: मुझे वह पसंद है, लेकिन मैं प्यार में नहीं हूँ.
translations.pl: Lubię ją, ale nie jestem zakochany.
translations.el: Μου αρέσει, αλλά δεν είμαι ερωτευμένος.
translations.nb: Jeg liker henne, men jeg er ikke forelsket.
translations.id: Aku suka dia, tapi aku tidak jatuh cinta.
translations.sv: Jag gillar henne, men jag är inte förälskad.
translations.ro: Îmi place de ea, dar nu sunt îndrăgostit.
translations.cs: Mám ji rád, ale nejsem zamilovaný.
translations.da: Jeg kan godt lide hende, men jeg er ikke forelsket.
translations.fi: Pidän hänestä, mutta en ole rakastunut.
translations.ja: 彼女のことは好きだけど、恋してはいない。

tokens.explanation: Personal pronoun, 1st person singular nominative; subject of the first clause.
Finite lexical verb (present indicative, 1st sg); transitive verb selecting a direct object.
Personal pronoun in accusative function as direct object; form is ambiguous (her/them) in German.
Coordinating conjunction linking two independent clauses.
Personal pronoun, 1st person singular nominative; subject of the second clause.
Finite copular auxiliary (present indicative, 1st sg) linking the subject to the predicate.
Negation particle expressing sentential/predicate negation.
Predicative adjective; complement of the copula, here under negation.

sentences.target: Seit dem Film bin ich wieder verliebt.
sentences.reading: /zaɪt deːm fɪlm bɪn ɪç ˈviːdɐ fɛɐ̯ˈliːpt/

translations.de: Seit dem Film bin ich wieder verliebt.
translations.ipa: /zaɪt deːm fɪlm bɪn ɪç ˈviːdɐ fɛɐ̯ˈliːpt/
translations.en: Since that movie, I'm in love again.
translations.es: Desde esa película, me volví a enamorar.
translations.fr: Depuis ce film, je suis retombé amoureux.
translations.it: Da quel film, sono di nuovo innamorato.
translations.ko: 그 영화 이후로 다시 사랑에 빠졌어.
translations.zh-Hans: 看了那部电影后，我又恋爱了。
translations.yue: 睇完嗰套電影之後，我又愛上咗。
translations.ru: После того фильма я снова влюбился.
translations.pt: Depois daquele filme, me apaixonei de novo.
translations.he: מאז הסרט ההוא אני שוב מאוהב.
translations.tr: O filmden beri yeniden aşık oldum.
translations.vi: Sau bộ phim đó, tôi lại yêu trở lại.
translations.ar: منذ ذلك الفيلم، وقعت في الحب من جديد.
translations.nl: Sinds die film ben ik weer verliefd.
translations.uk: Після того фільму я знову закохався.
translations.hu: A film óta újra szerelmes vagyok.
translations.hi: उस फिल्म के बाद मैं फिर से प्यार में पड़ गया हूँ.
translations.pl: Po tym filmie znów się zakochałem.
translations.el: Μετά από εκείνη την ταινία, ερωτεύτηκα ξανά.
translations.nb: Etter den filmen er jeg forelsket igjen.
translations.id: Sejak film itu, aku jatuh cinta lagi.
translations.sv: Efter den filmen är jag kär igen.
translations.ro: După filmul ăla, m-am îndrăgostit din nou.
translations.cs: Po tom filmu jsem se znovu zamiloval.
translations.da: Efter den film er jeg forelsket igen.
translations.fi: Sen elokuvan jälkeen olen taas rakastunut.
translations.ja: あの映画を観てから、また恋してる。

tokens.explanation: Preposition taking dative; introduces a temporal prepositional phrase.
Definite article, dative singular; determiner of ‘Film’.
Common noun, dative singular; object of the preposition ‘seit’ within the PP.
Finite copular auxiliary (present indicative, 1st sg) linking subject and predicative adjective.
Personal pronoun, 1st person singular nominative; subject.
Aspectual/temporal adverb indicating repetition.
Predicative adjective; complement of the copula.
